feat.name: Swift Banishment
feat.requirement: You have a banishment spell prepared
feat.text: The force of your blow sends your victim back to its home plane. You expend a *banishment* spell you have prepared, affecting the creature you critically hit without needing to cast the spell. The creature can attempt to resist the spell as normal.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

feat.trigger: You critically hit a creature that is not on its home plane
